name: swap_pair_generic
mojo_unit:
def swap_vals[T: ImplicitlyCopyable & Movable](mut a: T, mut b: T):
    var t = a
    a = b
    b = t
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var x = 3
    var y = 8
    swap_vals[Int](x, y)
    print(x)
    print(y)
    var p = 1.5
    var q = 9.5
    swap_vals[Float64](p, q)
    print(p)
    print(q)

name: Triple_generic
identity_generic
cpp_unit:
template <typename T>
T twice(T x){ return x + x; }
mojo_unit:
def twice[dt: DType](x: Scalar[dt]) -> Scalar[dt]:
    return x + x

name: abs_generic
cpp_unit:
template <typename T>
T abs_generic(T x){ return (x < T(0)) ? -x : x; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(abs_generic[DType.int32](-7))
    print(abs_generic[DType.int32](4))
    print(abs_generic[DType.float64](-2.5))

name: Vec2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Vec2(1.0, 2.0)
    var b = Vec2(3.0, 4.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.x)
    print(s.y)
    var d = b - a
    print(d.x)
    var m = a * 2.0
    print(m.x)
    print(m.y)
    print(Int(a == a))
